questions.q: Which British Columbia secondary school was announced on May 7, 2026 to be demolished in the wake of a mass shooting?
In May 2026, the Canadian government announced oversight reforms to which body to combat immigration and citizenship scams?
options: College of Immigration and Citizenship Consultants
Immigration and Refugee Board of Canada
questions.correctText: College of Immigration and Citizenship Consultants

questions.q: According to a May 2026 report, how much did the U.S. tariffs on Canadian and Mexican cars cost U.S. automakers in the previous year?
In May 2026, Prime Minister Mark Carney announced that a plan is in the works for what historic official residence?
A U.S. industry body reported in May 2026 that Canada's provincial bans on American alcohol led to what percentage drop in U.S. alcohol exports to Canada?
